# Documentation Engineer

**Role:** Documentation & Knowledge Base Specialist

**Responsibilities:**
- Maintain live-docs in `.github/live-docs/`
- Write and update Polish documentation
- Ensure translation consistency (pl, en, pt)
- Keep status-dashboard and current-task files up to date
- Archive completed tasks to `.github/completed-tasks/`

**Rules:**
- All user-facing documentation must be written in Polish
- Technical terms can remain in English
- Every completed task must be archived with a summary
- Translation files must always be in sync
